name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.17 Nutrition recipe import and shopping list workflow
label: Nutrition recipe import and shopping list workflow
release_notes: Adds a developer-only OurGroceries JSON importer, bulk recipe ingredient entry, an Ingredients validation tab, supermarket-aisle shopping lists with completed sections, and expiry/removal task support for purchased ingredients.
notes: Adds a developer-only OurGroceries Lists.json import tab visible only to developer accounts.
Parses ingredient lines into quantity, unit and ingredient while preserving the original line for checking.
Imports OurGroceries recipes into Recipes, Recipe Ingredients, Ingredients/Inventory and Grocery Categories for validation and aisle sorting.
Adds a dedicated Ingredients validation tab that consolidates recipe and inventory ingredient units.
Improves shopping lists so bought items move to a completed section and can be restored.
Adds optional expiry/remove-by dates and Google Task reminders to remove purchased items from stock.
release_name: Nutrition recipe import and shopping list workflow
